description_long: This is a modern, angular desk lamp with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a rectangular base and a sharply angled arm supporting a flat, elongated light head. The lamp is predominantly black with a subtle matte finish, and the underside of the light head emits a soft yellowish glow, suggesting an integrated LED strip. The arm is composed of two parallel bars, providing both structural support and a contemporary aesthetic. The base is wide and stable, ensuring the lamp remains upright and secure on flat surfaces. There are no visible switches or buttons, indicating that any controls may be touch-sensitive or located discreetly. The overall design is functional and stylish, suitable for urban workspaces, offices, or modern home environments.
description: A sleek, black, angular desk lamp with a flat, elongated light head and a wide, stable base, emitting a soft yellowish light. Its minimalist design features parallel support arms and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply angled arm and the flat, elongated light head with a yellowish underside.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two parallel support arms and the rectangular base, with the lamp head seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the angled arm and the flat light head from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the parallel arms and the back of the lamp head, with the base fully visible.
